name: Core Stabilization
description:
This upgrade can only be attached once per game.

This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Shattered Asset
granted_abilities.text: When this model is dealt 2 or more damage, this model must discard an upgrade with this ability. Then, reduce damage dealt by 2 (to a minimum of 0).

granted_abilities.name: Laugh Off
granted_abilities.text: If this model would be moved from an enemy model's effect, it may discard a card to choose not to.
